title: thelypteris tonkinensis
intro: Thelypteris tonkinensis, also known as the Tonkin maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris tonkinensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an anti-cancer agent. Thelypteris tonkinensis is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and it can also be dried and used as an herbal extract or powder.
